Those trees which are glossy, have long overhanging branches,
are very short and very extensive, have water nearby ^i.e. there
must be water under ground in such places); whereas those that ar
hollow, have pale leaves, and are dry,do not indicate water in the
neighbourhood.

there will be water at a depth of 22| cubits and at a distance of
